summary: Added an official-CLI-style dynamic run surface with schema help, project aliases, prompt shorthand, typed key-value inputs, pricing, waits, and downloads.
reason: WaveSpeed model IDs are slash-delimited dynamic paths with per-model schemas, so a generated static endpoint wrapper cannot provide the official model-run ergonomics by itself.
validated_outcome: go test ./...; dry-run run and price smokes; live price-only smoke for google/nano-banana/Seedance-family model inputs
